title: Maya Advises Rafa — Can, Should, Must
description: Core modals: CAN (ability), SHOULD (advice), MUST (obligation), MIGHT (possibility). Maya tells Rafa how to expand to Orlando.
summary_pt_br: Modais essenciais: can (conseguir/poder), should (deveria), must (tem que), might (talvez). Sempre vêm seguidos do verbo NA FORMA BASE (sem 'to').

scenes.subtitle_en: Modals: the little words that change everything
scenes.subtitle_pt: Modais: as palavrinhas que mudam tudo

scenes.text_en:
Rafa asked Maya: 'What CAN I do? What SHOULD I do? What MUST I do?'
Maya grinned. 'Three modals. Three answers.
You CAN open a food truck — the ability is yours.
You SHOULD visit Orlando first — it's wise.
You MUST get a permit — you have no choice.'
scenes.text_pt:
Rafa perguntou pra Maya: 'O que POSSO fazer? O que DEVO fazer? O que TENHO que fazer?'
Maya sorriu. 'Três modais. Três respostas.
Você PODE abrir um food truck — a capacidade é sua.
Você DEVERIA visitar Orlando antes — é sábio.
Você TEM QUE tirar uma licença — não tem opção.'

scenes.title: Modal verbs — always + base verb
scenes.body_en: Modals (can, should, must, might, could, would, may) are followed by the BASE form of the verb. No 'to', no -s, no -ed. 'She can swim' (not 'she cans' or 'she can to swim'). Negative: can + not = can't, should + not = shouldn't, must + not = mustn't. Question: invert subject — 'Can you swim?' 'Should I leave?'
scenes.body_pt: Modais (can, should, must, might, could, would, may) sempre vêm com o verbo na forma BASE. Sem 'to', sem -s. 'She can swim' (não 'she cans'). Negativa: can't, shouldn't, mustn't. Pergunta: inverte o sujeito.

examples.en: I can cook. She can cook. They can cook. (no -s)
examples.pt: O modal nunca muda com he/she/it.

examples.en: You should try it. You shouldn't wait.

exercise.question: You need to give strong advice. Which?
exercise.explanation: SHOULD = recommendation / advice. Strong but not forced.

exercise.question: Law: stopping at a red light. Which?
exercise.explanation: MUST = no choice, legal or strong obligation.

exercise.question: Softer advice: 'You ___ want to check the weather.' (polite possibility)

exercise.explanation: Match each modal to its function. Context changes everything.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Cada modal tem uma função principal. Memorize os pares.
